---
title: "FirstGraph"
author: "Arkadzi Rakach"
date: "2026-04-04"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Article Name: "Tweeting From Left to Right: Is Online Political Communication More Than an Echo Chamber?"

## Data Source Link: https://github.com/pablobarbera/echo_chambers?tab=readme-ov-file

##Unit of Observation: Individual social media (Twitter) users

##Possible Research Question: To what extent do Twitter users mainly interact with other users who share similar ideological positions to them?

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

str(estimates)
head(estimates)
```


## Distribution of predicted ideologies as used in this study, which are placed on a -3.0 to 3.0 scale.

```{r}
ggplot(estimates, aes(x = ideology)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 18) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Estimated Ideology Scores",
    x = "Estimated ideology",
    y = "Count"
  )
```
